CustomField.description: The field confirms the Opportunity Territory Name belongs to the Life Science BU and enables to bypass the Quote Studio related opportunity fields (S-695552). This field is modified to include Diagnostic value based on Ticket#- INC0371307.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The field confirms the Opportunity Territory Name belongs to the Life Science BU and enables to bypass the Quote Studio related opportunity fields
CustomField.label: fxOppType
